hero.title: A fresh, breathing oasis in southern Spain.
hero.subtitle: A place where you don't just stay. A place where you truly come back to yourself.

facilities.title: Your own place under the Andalusian sun
facilities.text: At Casa Malacitano we offer two unique stays: a fully equipped casita and a cozy studio apartment. Both with access to our wonderful outdoor facilities. Not a place where you have to, a place where you get to. Genuine Spanish hospitality, no mass tourism.

accommodations.title: Our accommodations
accommodations.subtitle: Choose the stay that suits you and easily book directly or via Airbnb.

casita.title: Casita Malacitano
casita.text: A beautiful, stylishly furnished detached house with its own veranda. Equipped with a spacious living room with open kitchen, bedroom and a modern bathroom. Enjoy the breathtaking view in complete privacy.

casa.title: Casa Malacitano
casa.text: A cozy and beautifully renovated studio apartment. Connected to the main building, but with a private entrance and terrace. Perfect as a comfortable base for hikers and active travelers.

village.title: Valle de Abdalajís
village.text: Valle de Abdalajís, nestled between mountain ridges in the province of Málaga, is an authentic Andalusian village that tourism has largely passed by. With around 2,500 residents, a handful of bars, several restaurants, two supermarkets for daily groceries, a bakery, a pharmacy and a greengrocer, it is a typical Spanish village with a pace of life that calms you down the moment you arrive.

hosts.title: Meet Jans & Minouche
hosts.text: [Placeholder: a short, warm introduction about Jans and Minouche together. Who they are, how they ended up in Valle de Abdalajís, and what kind of hosts they are.]

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.text: Questions about availability, arrival or the area? We're happy to help. Reach out directly and we'll get back to you quickly.
